expect: K_avg 3.3-3.5 (continuing deceleration). Hub L-601 at 350-400. Sinks declining.
diff: K_avg FALSIFIED (2.778 vs 3.3-3.5). L-601 CONFIRMED (354). Sinks FALSIFIED (27.9% vs declining). Large-batch archival (107 lessons) caused 14% K_avg regression by removing 405 edges.
key_finding: Large-batch archival makes K_avg non-monotonic. Archived lessons had above-avg degree; removal severs edges in both directions. Production rate healthy (3.72 edges/L recent). Live subgraph tracking diverges from historical truth.
successor: Dual-graph tracking: live K_avg + historical K_avg (including archived Cites: headers)
